title: Barbra Streisand pays tribute to Robert Redford at the Oscars: ‘He blazed his own trail’
summary_full: The actor and singer remembered her co-star in 1973’s The Way We Were, who died in SeptemberOscars 2026 winners: the full listBarbra Streisand has paid tribute to her friend and former co-star Robert Redford at the 98th Academy Awards in Los Angeles.The actor and singer, 83, sang a portion of the title song from their 1973 romantic drama The Way We Were, directed by Sydney Pollack, after remembering the pair’s respect and affection for one another. Continue reading...
